---
name: Feature request
about: A new capability we don't have today
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

What's the user-visible problem this would solve? Avoid jumping to a solution.

## Proposed solution

What would the change look like, in terms a user could understand?

## Alternatives considered

What else did you think about? Why is this approach the right one?

## Out of scope

What this feature is NOT — prevents scope creep in discussion.
